name: Milestone Update
subject: Milestone Update: {project_name} ({date})
body:
Dear Stakeholders,

Please find attached the latest milestone timeline for {project_name} as of {date}.

The attached chart shows all key milestones and their current status relative to the baselined schedule. Green milestones are on track; amber milestones are at risk; red milestones have slipped beyond their baseline dates.

Next milestone review is scheduled as per the project calendar. Please contact {project_manager} if you have questions or require further detail on any milestone.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
body_html:
Dear Stakeholders,

Below is the latest milestone timeline for {project_name} as of {date}. The chart is also attached as an SVG file.

{svg_inline}

 On track
 At risk
 Slipped beyond baseline

Next milestone review is scheduled as per the project calendar. Please contact {project_manager} if you have questions or require further detail on any milestone.

Kind regards,
{project_manager}
